text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, machines can produce art, music, and writing that look and sound surprisingly human. For example, AI can paint in the style of famous artists, compose original songs, or write short stories. However, there is an important difference between human and machine creativity. Human creativity comes from emotions, personal experiences, and the desire to communicate something meaningful. AI, on the other hand, works by learning patterns from huge amounts of existing data and recreating them. While AI can produce impressive results, many people argue that it lacks true originality or emotion. So, rather than replacing human artists, AI might become a new tool that helps spark fresh ideas.
